title: RedClaw hits 41% on SWE-bench using free models
excerpt: We got RedClaw to solve 41% of SWE-bench problems using GLM-5.1 — a free model. Here's how subagent bloodlines and DNA evolution made it happen.
content:
## The Challenge

SWE-bench is the gold standard for evaluating coding agents. Most top performers use expensive models like Claude or GPT-4. We wanted to see what was possible with free models.

## How We Did It

The key was **subagent bloodlines**. Instead of one agent trying everything, RedClaw spawns subagents that inherit wisdom from previous runs. Each generation gets smarter.

The **DNA evolution** system means successful strategies propagate. Failed ones die off. After a few generations, the agents have learned which approaches work for which types of problems.

## The Results

- **41% solve rate** on SWE-bench Lite
- **Zero cost** — running entirely on free GLM-5.1
- **Sub-5 minute** average solve time

## What's Next

We're pushing for 50% with improved dream synthesis — letting agents sleep on hard problems and wake up with new approaches. The dream cycle synthesizes patterns from thousands of previous attempts.

Stay slothful.

title: GodotCode: Claude inside your game editor
excerpt: We built an AI assistant that lives inside the Godot editor. Scene tree inspection, live screenshots, shell commands, image generation — all from a chat window.
content:
## Why

Context switching kills flow. Every time you leave your editor to ask an AI a question, you lose momentum. GodotCode brings the AI to where you already are.

## What It Does

GodotCode is a Godot 4.6 editor plugin that gives you a full Claude-powered AI assistant inside the editor. But it's not just chat — it has **tools**.

### Live Editor Tools

- **Scene tree inspection** — ask the AI to find nodes, check properties, debug signal connections
- **Screenshots** — the AI can take screenshots of your game to understand visual issues
- **Node property editing** — modify any property directly from the chat

### Code Intelligence

- **Glob/Grep search** across your entire project
- **Shell execution** for build steps, testing, git operations
- **File read/write** with full project awareness

### Creative Tools

- **Image generation** via NVIDIA NIM (Flux) — generate textures and sprites in-chat
- **Web tools** for documentation lookup

## The Architecture

The plugin runs as a GDScript panel that communicates with Claude via the Anthropic API. Tool calls are mapped to editor actions through a permission system that keeps you in control.

## Try It

Grab it from the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/slothitude/godotcode) and drop it in your addons folder.

title: Building SlothFlix: Netflix-style streaming from torrents
excerpt: How we built a self-hosted streaming platform with sequential torrent downloading, embedded video playback, and a Netflix-inspired UI — all in Docker.
content:
## The Problem

We wanted the Netflix experience without the subscription. Stream what you want, when you want, without waiting for full downloads.

## The Solution

SlothFlix streams torrents **sequentially** — you start watching before the file finishes downloading. It's like having a personal streaming server.

## Architecture

```
SlothFlix Stack:
├── Web UI (Netflix-style, responsive)
├── Sequential torrent client (libtorrent)
├── HTML5 video player (streaming-friendly)
├── VPN container (all traffic routed through it)
└── Docker Compose (one-command deploy)
```

## Key Features

### Sequential Streaming

The torrent client prioritizes pieces in order. Within seconds, the video player has enough data to start playback. No more waiting for the last 1%.

### VPN Protection

All traffic routes through a VPN container. Your ISP sees encrypted traffic, nothing else.

### Automatic Posters

The UI fetches movie posters and metadata automatically. Browse your library like a real streaming service.

## Deploy It

```bash
docker compose up -d
```

That's it. One command and you're streaming.
